# kemp_waf_custom_rule (Resource)

Uploads a custom rule file for the legacy commercial WAF engine. Distinct from `kemp_owasp_custom_rule`; choose based on which intercept_mode (`1` Legacy vs `2` OWASP) you're configuring on virtual services.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "kemp_waf_custom_rule" "brute_force" {
  filename = "modsecurity_crs_11_brute_force"
  data     = base64encode(file("${path.module}/modsecurity_crs_11_brute_force"))
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `data` (String, Sensitive) Base64-encoded file content.
- `filename` (String) Filename — single rule file (e.g. `modsecurity_crs_11_brute_force`) or a tar.gz ruleset bundle.
